guidelines.dev: EDD — write 3 behavioral evals before touching skill files. NFR: SKILL.md description ≤150 chars, model/effort frontmatter, body ≤500 lines. Scan profile adds to framework.json validation_profiles — do not modify existing profiles.
guidelines.qa: Validate against 11 ACs. Verify framework.json schema consistency with existing profiles. Verify scan composes with corpus mode. Verify backward compatibility of gate/checkpoint/full.

avfl-scan-profile.test_approach: EDD — 3 evals: scan no-fix-loop, structured output format, existing profiles unchanged
